source: Bloons Wiki — representative sample (Module 3 of AI/BTD6 plan)

maps.description: Single river-and-logs track. Heavy water coverage in places.
maps.lines_of_sight_notes: Open central area; water tile presence allows naval towers.

maps.description: Tight quartered paths with cubes obstructing line of sight.
maps.lines_of_sight_notes: Cubes block towers; consider towers that ignore LoS or place near gaps.

maps.description: Open field with a winding path. Forgiving placement.
maps.lines_of_sight_notes: Open layout; nearly any tower works.
